⚡ Recommended AOV Tiers
Designed for avg order ৳280 · 15% margin · ৳100 delivery. Click "+ Add" to instantly create.
Tier 1 — Starter
WELCOME50
৳50 off
Min order: ৳500
Pushes avg ৳280 → ৳500 basket. Customer gets ৳50 off, you keep ~৳25 margin on product + delivery profit.
Tier 2 — Loyalty
SAFA10
10% off
Min order: ৳800
Free delivery already unlocked at ৳700. 10% off drives customers to ৳800+ baskets, effective AOV 3× uplift.
Tier 3 — Bulk
SAFA15
15% off
Min order: ৳1,200
Strong incentive for family or repeat bulk orders. 15% discount at 15% margin is break-even — use for volume only.
Tier 4 — Wholesale
MEGA20
20% off
Min order: ৳2,000
Corporate/restaurant wholesale. Max AOV pull. Accept thin margin for volume and relationship. Share selectively.
